name: Peripheral Device Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of connected peripheral devices
query:
// Detect peripheral device enumeration
// Trigger on USB, drive, or device listing commands
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(wmic\s+diskdrive|wmic\s+logicaldisk|lsusb|lsblk|Get-PnpDevice|Get-WmiObject.*Win32_DiskDrive)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
